# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-policy-server
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-policy
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-default-deny
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Default deny policy - denies all traffic unless explicitly allowed"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-policy-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-mesh-tls
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Requires mTLS identity for all meshed service communication"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.linkerd-policy.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
  identityRefs:
    - group: ""
      kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: linkerd-policy

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-meshed-traffic
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-allow-meshed
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Allows authenticated mTLS traffic from meshed services within the namespace"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-policy-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-allow-probes
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Allows unauthenticated health check probes from kubelet"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-policy-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network-authn
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-network-authn
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-kubelet-network
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Authenticates kubelet health probe traffic by source network"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-server
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-admin-server
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Admin server for health checks and metrics - restricted access"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 4191
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-probes
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-admin-probes
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy-controller
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy-controller
    description: "Allows kubelet to reach admin endpoints for liveness and readiness probes"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: admin-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network-authn
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
